name: bring-back-spawner-blocking
title: Bring Back Spawner Blocking
author: BeraIV
description: Reverts the 2.1 spawner changes that broke walling off nests, and adds a Mining-Patch-Planner-style selection tool (ALT+S): drag it over spawners to drop a sparse grid of pipe ghosts (period = spawning_spacing) out to spawning_radius. Shift-drag removes pipe ghosts this tool placed.
